description: Sweep de otimização — Qwen3-4B Q4_K_M no Snapdragon 8 Gen 5

sweeps.name: batch_size
sweeps.note: Prompt processing speed. 36 layers × 2560 dims suporta lotes maiores

sweeps.name: flash_attn
sweeps.note: Flash Attention reduz uso de RAM no KV cache

sweeps.name: ngl
sweeps.note: GPU Vulkan offload. 10 = sweet spot (+12%), 99 = gargalo

sweeps.name: mlock
sweeps.note: Trava modelo na RAM física, evita swap. Cuidado com OOM.

test_prompts.text: Write a Python function that sums even numbers in a list. Code only.
Explain how a CPU executes a program step by step.
